title: MD
biography: Ambroise Pare was a French surgeon considered the father of modern surgery. He replaced cauterization with ligatures for amputations and developed numerous surgical instruments and prosthetic devices.
aiSummary: Ambroise Pare is a surgery specialist at Hotel-Dieu Hospital. Based in Paris.

affiliations.role: Surgeon to four Kings of France

timeline.title: Replaced cauterization with ligatures
timeline.description: Demonstrated that tying blood vessels was superior to cauterizing with boiling oil

timeline.title: Published collected surgical works
timeline.description: Published his comprehensive surgical treatises, transforming surgical practice
